sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Encumbrance System
special_mechanics.description: Every item in the game including money has weight. If total weight exceeds Load Capacity (LC), character moves slowly

special_mechanics.name: Day-Night Cycle with Resource Management
special_mechanics.description: Character must eat two times per day and sleep regularly. Staying up late or failing to eat causes HP and attack power to gradually drop

physics_values.stat_degradation: gradual HP and attack power loss from fatigue/hunger

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative) - No precise physics parameters documented. Game emphasizes RPG mechanics like encumbrance, morality system, and resource management over tight action platforming. Movement affected by inventory weight rather than traditional speed values.
